---
title: "Alfred Moberly"
---

## Alfred Moberly

**Dates:** (b. Surrey 1835/6)

### Description

nephew of the Rev. George Moberly

### Biography

Described as retired major of infantry in the 1881 census.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 4th [1886]
- Letter from March 24th 1862 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
